title: HVAC Technician

rationales.taskAutomation: Diagnostic app guidance and smart-thermostat data pull real automatable share into the job, but refrigerant handling, physical repair and code-driven installation remain manual.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted diagnostic tools tied to smart thermostats and connected HVAC systems are shipping and improving fast across major manufacturers.
rationales.adoption: Larger HVAC service franchises now route dispatch and first-level diagnosis through AI tools; independent shops lag.
rationales.agenticExposure: An agent can triage a smart-thermostat fault code and schedule the visit; it cannot recover refrigerant, braze a line or commission a system.

tasksAtRisk: First-level fault-code triage from connected thermostats
Service scheduling and technician dispatch routing
tasksGrowing: Diagnosing multi-system faults AI triage tools misclassify
salarySource: BLS OES May 2023, SOC 49-9021, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: EPA refrigerant handling and compliance expertise

insight: HVAC sits slightly above other trades because connected thermostats and AI-assisted diagnostics genuinely automate first-level fault triage today, and adoption is real at scale among larger service franchises. The heat-pump and electrification wave is the growth lane: commissioning new all-electric systems isn't something diagnostic software can do end-to-end.
